title: cPanel shell overhaul, releases UI, and ops rollback
description:
Horizon Pipe cPanel gets a shared shell (navigation, theme, layout) across billing, dashboard, login, setup, ops, and releases. Releases admin now lists platform versions in a dropdown and can push a chosen build to SaaS tenants from the UI.

Ops console rollback is split into separate Frontend and Backend release dropdowns, wired to a new POST /ops/rollback/release endpoint and server-side rollback script.

Backend adds GET /saas/platform/releases/list for the releases page and rollback support in ovh-ops.

Who is affected: OVH-hosted PipeShare (cPanel + ops). SaaS tenants receive frontend/backend only when you publish and push from Releases.
changeLog: cPanel: shared cpanel-shell.js/css and refreshed pages (cache ?v=20260628shell1).
Releases: version dropdown, list API, Push to SaaS from admin UI.
Ops: separate Frontend/Backend rollback dropdowns and styling.
